subject: cublas_bindings
build_command: cargo build -p rurix-cublas(cdylib);ctypes 加载 rurix_cublas_gemm/gemv,torch CUDA 张量 data_ptr 设备地址零拷贝

redistribution.note: Attachment A 白名单最小集(cublas64_*.dll 运行期库);完整 Toolkit/驱动/Nsight 永不捆绑(r6);M8.2 链接系统 DLL,物理捆绑/再分发承接 M8.4

redgreen.red_command: 篡改 cublas GEMM 绑定数值结果(run_gemm cublas α=1→2,绑定 = 2·A·B ≠ A@B)后步骤 35 cublas 绑定冒烟与 torch.matmul 参考数值对照
redgreen.green_command: py -3 ci/cublas_binding_smoke.py(cargo build -p rurix-cublas cdylib → ctypes 零拷贝 → gemm/gemv 数值对照通过)
redgreen.run_url: self-hosted RTX 4070 Ti runner pr-smoke 步骤 35 真实红绿(反 YAML-only,H06 D11.8-2):绿 https://github.com/qwasg/Rurix/actions/runs/27619290198(step35 success) → 红 https://github.com/qwasg/Rurix/actions/runs/27619643676(step35 failure,篡改 cublas GEMM 绑定数值 α=2≠1) → 复原绿 https://github.com/qwasg/Rurix/actions/runs/27619860120(step35 success)
